title: Scopper Gaban Tests Luffy
description: On pages 10–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Nami, Luffy as Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.
scene: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Did you know there were two other...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...monstrous fighters on the pirate King's crew besides Roger?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One time, when Cap'n Roger needed to recuperate...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that man accompanied him to a hospital deep within the mountains... unfortunately...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Enemy Pirates surrounded the hospital, trying to capture them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But that one man- armed with nothing but his two sexes-fought off hundreds of them all by himself!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: One man... with just two axis?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that's not even the craziest part! When the battle was over...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not a single tree was left standing. He stripped the entire mountain bare!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's how he got the name "mountain eater!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He rivaled vice-captain silvers Rayleigh, and was known as the left hand of the pirate king...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sir ya, how do you know about this place?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why is it just the chests?! They're all empty!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gaha ha ha! Well, it used to be a treasure chamber!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is an abandoned castle. It's only natural thieves worried their way in at some point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Jtize, take a look at this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even the bad guys don't want Luki freed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's been living here in Elbaf for over 30 years now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The living legend who stood shoulder to shoulder with Roger and Rayleigh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you want it, you'll have to get past me!

summary: This part advances the Scopper Gaban and Elbaf’s New Threat through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
